summary: First-iteration full-stack regression of Clinique+ SGC. Built 25 backend pytest cases covering login for all 6 roles, role-filtered endpoints, doctor consultation+prescription flow, nurse lits update + blood bank donor add, pharmacist medicament create, accountant facture+paiement 'Encaisser' flow, patient self-data, and admin services/lits creation. Found and fixed 2 CRITICAL bugs (one backend route-shadowing, one infra-level Mixed Content via missing ProxyHeadersMiddleware) plus 1 frontend form bug (missing required field). All 25 backend tests now pass and all 6 role frontend dashboards load with zero Mixed Content errors and zero 'En développement' placeholders. RBAC redirect verified.

critical.issue: Route shadowing: /{service_id} was declared before /lits and /lits/{lit_id} so any GET to /services/lits returned 404 'Service non trouvé'. This broke the entire nurse beds page and any other client listing lits. FIXED by reordering routes in /app/backend/routers/services.py (lits routes moved BEFORE /{service_id}).

FastAPI's 307 trailing-slash redirect was returning Location: http://... (HTTP scheme) behind the Cloudflare/k8s ingress, causing browser Mixed Content blocking on dozens of API calls (admin/patients, medecin/patients, infirmiere/patients, pharmacien/prescriptions, patient/appointments etc.). FIXED by adding uvicorn ProxyHeadersMiddleware in /app/backend/server.py so Location now correctly emits https://.

minor.issue: Pharmacien-role calls these on the prescriptions page and gets 403 (correctly enforced by backend). Frontend should not issue these calls for the pharmacist role, but page still renders. Cosmetic only.

ui_bugs.issue: Form payload omits required field categorie_id. Backend Medicament model requires categorie_id (Pydantic Literal). Submitting will return 422. Frontend needs a <select> populated from GET /api/pharmacy/categories. File: /app/frontend/src/pages/pharmacist/PharmacienMedicamentsList.js (emptyMed object + form JSX).

action_items: Add categorie_id <select> (loaded from /api/pharmacy/categories) to PharmacienMedicamentsList 'Nouveau médicament' form -- currently the form will 422 on submit.
(Optional) Remove the patients/users fetch from PharmacienPrescriptionsList for pharmacist role to suppress harmless 403 console noise.

Self-test the frontend submit flows (lit status change, donor add, medicament add after categorie_id fix, consultation create, prescription create, encaisser, services/lits forms) -- all underlying APIs are verified green.
critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering pitfall: declaring path-param routes (e.g. /{service_id}) before literal sub-paths (e.g. /lits) silently shadows them. Apply same audit to any other router that mixes /{id} with literal subpaths.
FastAPI behind any reverse proxy ALWAYS needs ProxyHeadersMiddleware (or uvicorn --proxy-headers) or redirects/url_for/Location will use the wrong scheme. Now fixed.

Pydantic schema/UI field-name drift: pharmacy form uses stock_actuel/stock_min but model uses seuil_stock_min; billing UI ok but ItemFacture uses 'total' not 'montant'; Paiement model uses 'methode' not 'mode_paiement'. Test these flows in actual UI to be sure forms submit -- backend models are the source of truth.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (added ProxyHeadersMiddleware to fix Mixed Content on 307 redirects)

success_rate.frontend: smoke OK across all 6 roles, 1 form needs categorie_id fix

test_credentials: admin1@clinique.com/admin123, medecin1@clinique.com/medecin123, infirmiere1@clinique.com/infirmiere123, pharmacien1@clinique.com/pharmacien123, comptable1@clinique.com/comptable123, patient1@email.com/patient123 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md)
seed_data_creation: Tests prefix created records with 'TEST_' (services, lits, medicaments, factures, paiements, donneurs). No teardown but easy to identify.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints are healthy. Re-run /app/backend/tests/test_clinique_roles.py for regression. Remaining frontend follow-up: (1) verify the 'Nouveau médicament' form once main agent adds the categorie_id field; (2) optionally exercise PDF export buttons in browser (export-facture-<id>, prescription PDF) and confirm window.print is invoked without JS error; (3) full inline interactions (lit status change select, encaisser button, donor add, consultation+prescription create) are wired against now-working APIs but were not click-tested end-to-end -- main agent or next test agent can do that since backend is green.
rca_of_the_issue: Two RCAs: (a) /services/lits 404 -> root cause was FastAPI matching paths in declaration order; /{service_id} declared first absorbed 'lits' as service_id. Reproduction: GET /api/services/lits as any authenticated user -> 404 'Service non trouvé'. Mitigation applied: moved /lits and /lits/{lit_id} routes above /{service_id}. (b) Mixed Content blocks -> root cause was FastAPI generating absolute redirect URLs from the request scheme (http inside the cluster) when responding to slashless URLs that need a trailing-slash 307; the public URL is https so the browser blocked the resulting http Location. Reproduction: curl -I https://.../api/patients -> Location: http://.../api/patients/ . Mitigation: app.add_middleware(ProxyHeadersMiddleware, trusted_hosts='*') so Starlette honors X-Forwarded-Proto. Verified: Location now https://.
